items.name: DocItem
items.doc:
A single public item extracted from source.
`doc` is empty if no `///` comment was found above the item.

items.name: SourceDoc
items.doc: All items from a single source file (documented + undocumented).

items.name: ManifestEntry
items.doc: Summary entry in MANIFEST.json — one row per source file.

items.name: ManifestItem
items.doc: Summary item entry for MANIFEST all_items table.
